---
title: "cleaning.r"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-09"
---

```{r}
# load raw data
raw_df <- read.csv("Rape_Data_20260319.csv", na.strings = c("(null)", "", "NA"))
# make a copy
df <- raw_df
```

```{r}
# drop uninformative columns
df$HADEVELOPT <- NULL
df$PARKS_NM <- NULL
df$Lat_Lon <- NULL
df$KY_CD <- NULL
df$LAW_CAT_CD <- NULL
df$JURIS_DESC <- NULL
df$PD_CD <- NULL
df$CMPLNT_TO_DT <- NULL
df$CMPLNT_TO_TM <- NULL
```

```{r}
# parse dates
df$CMPLNT_FR_DT <- as.Date(df$CMPLNT_FR_DT, "%m/%d/%Y")
df$RPT_DT <- as.Date(df$RPT_DT, "%m/%d/%Y")
```

```{r}
# create new variables
df$DAY_OF_WEEK <- format(df$CMPLNT_FR_DT, "%A")
df$HOUR <- as.integer(substr(df$CMPLNT_FR_TM, 1, 2))
df$TIME_OF_DAY <- ifelse(df$HOUR >= 6 & df$HOUR < 12, "Morning",
                         ifelse(df$HOUR >= 12 & df$HOUR < 17, "Afternoon",
                                ifelse(df$HOUR >= 17 & df$HOUR < 21, "Evening",
                                       "Night")))
```

```{r}
# handle missing values
df$LOC_OF_OCCUR_DESC[is.na(df$LOC_OF_OCCUR_DESC)] <- "UNKNOWN"
df$PREM_TYP_DESC[is.na(df$PREM_TYP_DESC)] <- "UNKNOWN"
```


```{r}
write.csv(df, "Rape_Data_cleaned.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```
